name: Amanata Pressure
rawDescription: When Combo Multiplier reaches 8x, Heavy attacks apply a random Status Effect to enemies hit.

name: Anti-V
rawDescription: Digital extremists stand no chance when you have Anti-V on your side

name: Astral Autopsy
rawDescription: Fatal strikes against an enemy also perform a Codex Scan. Scans require an equipped Codex Scanner and an available charge.

name: Bleeding Willow
rawDescription: A blend of strong and rapid strikes with leaping combos.

name: Blind Justice
rawDescription: Reverse grip style emphasizing slashing and impaling strikes.

name: Butcher's Revelry
rawDescription: Rip and rend with this Assault Saw stance.

name: Byteryte
rawDescription: Keeps your bytes tight and your bits fit

name: Carving Mantis
rawDescription: Strong slashes and quick stabs that keeps momentum forward.

name: Coiling Viper
rawDescription: Powerful arcing strikes with energetic flips.

name: Cold Snap
rawDescription: Cosmic Crush Augment: The black hole saps the area of heat, freezing enemies in range. Enemies near the black hole are completely frozen for |val|s.

name: Crossing Snakes
rawDescription: Multi-angle strikes and deadly thrust attacks.

name: Crushing Ruin
rawDescription: Aerial attacks with Crowd Control combos.

name: Detect Vulnerability
rawDescription: Upon completing research on an enemy, subsequent scans will reveal their weak points.

name: Dig
rawDescription: The kubrow sniffs out buried objects and digs them up.

name: Efficient Beams
rawDescription: Only consume ammo when dealing damage.

name: Eleventh Storm
rawDescription: Rapid attacks using sword and shield.

name: Fass
rawDescription:
Roiling, moaning, this realm of ours

In madness lost shall die

name: Firestorm
rawDescription: Improves the Blast Radius of weapons with Radial Attacks.

name: Fracturing Wind
rawDescription: Fast, multi-hit strikes with powerful finishers.

name: Fulmination
rawDescription: Improves the Blast Radius of weapons with Radial Attacks.

name: Gemini Cross
rawDescription: A style exhibiting sweeping slash attacks and swift jabs.

name: Grim Fury
rawDescription: Lightning fast hit chains and hard-hitting combos.

name: Helminth Ferocity
rawDescription: Allows the Kubrow to use Finisher attacks on an enemy.

name: Higasa Serration
rawDescription: Alternate Fire applies a random Status Effect to enemies hit.

name: High Noon
rawDescription: Bullets spray between wicked slash attacks.

name: Iron Phoenix
rawDescription: Fast cutting attacks with puncture finish.

name: Jahu
rawDescription:
Corporeal laws are unwrit

As suns and love retreat

name: Khra
rawDescription:
To cosmic forms from tangent planes

We end as we began

name: Lohk
rawDescription:
From brooding gulfs are we beheld

By that which bears no name

name: Madurai Transmute Core
rawDescription: Ensures transmuted mod is of Madurai polarity and eliminates credit cost.

name: Napalm Grenades
rawDescription: Grenades leave a burning patch on impact.

name: Naramon Transmute Core
rawDescription: Ensures transmuted mod is of Naramon polarity and eliminates credit cost.

name: Natural Talent
rawDescription: Improves Casting Speed on Warframe abilities if applicable.

name: Netra
rawDescription:
Carrion hordes trill their profane

Accord with eldritch plans

name: Oull
rawDescription:
Through endless faces, countless forms, a multitude unfolds.

(Mimics any Requiem Mod)

name: Pack Leader
rawDescription: Heal your Companion with Melee hits. Excess healing grants Overguard.

name: Peculiar Bloom
rawDescription: Critical hits cause flowers to grow from the wounds.

name: Primed Firestorm
rawDescription: Improves the Blast Radius of weapons with Radial Attacks.

name: Primed Fulmination
rawDescription: Improves the Blast Radius of weapons with Radial Attacks.

name: Primed Pack Leader
rawDescription: Heal your Companion with Melee hits. Excess healing grants Overguard.

name: Reaping Spiral
rawDescription: Far flung attacks and multi-hit combos.

name: Rending Crane
rawDescription: Downward cuts with an impact combo.

name: Ris
rawDescription:
In luminous space blackened stars

They gaze, accuse, deny

name: Semi-Pistol Cannonade
rawDescription: Only compatible with Semi-Auto Trigger. Fire Rate cannot be modified.

name: Semi-Rifle Cannonade
rawDescription: Only compatible with Semi-Auto Trigger. Fire Rate cannot be modified.

name: Semi-Shotgun Cannonade
rawDescription: Only compatible with Semi-Auto Trigger. Fire Rate cannot be modified.

name: Shattering Storm
rawDescription: Methodical strikes and high impact combos.

name: Shimmering Blight
rawDescription: Fast spinning attacks and staggering strikes.

name: Sinking Talon
rawDescription: Strong, focused attacks with multi-hit spins.

name: Slicing Feathers
rawDescription: Twirling, acrobatic slashes with a refined touch.

name: Soft Safe
rawDescription: Keeping software safe by ALWAYS WATCHING

name: Sovereign Outcast
rawDescription: An outlandish style with sweeping attacks.

name: Sundering Weave
rawDescription: Steady chopping strikes with focused damage.

name: Transmute Core
rawDescription: Removes credits cost and guarantees the resultant mod polarity.

name: Twirling Spire
rawDescription: A mix of sweeping attacks with precise strikes.

name: Vazarin Transmute Core
rawDescription: Ensures transmuted mod is of Vazarin polarity and eliminates credit cost.

name: Vome
rawDescription:
To cosmic madness laws submit

Though stalwart minds entreat

name: Votive Onslaught
rawDescription: Precise, focused arcs and cuts not hampered by pity.

name: Worm Away
rawDescription: Get rid of malware, spyware, wetware and worms

name: Xata
rawDescription:
Its heralds are the stars it fells

The sky and Earth aflame
